# Mubboo — AI Consumer Platform

> Mubboo is an AI-powered consumer comparison and life assistant platform covering shopping, travel, finance, local services, and everyday information across multiple countries.

## About Mubboo

Mubboo helps everyday consumers make better decisions across five key areas of life. Every country site is built with native-quality local content — real brands, local prices, actual regulations, and cultural context. Founded in Australia, now live in five countries with plans for 30+.

## News

Daily coverage of AI, e-commerce, travel, finance, and consumer technology from the intersection of AI and everyday life.

- [News homepage](https://mubboo.ai/news) — Latest articles

## Blog

Deep analysis and founder insights on how AI is changing consumer experience.

- [Blog homepage](https://mubboo.ai/blog) — Latest posts

## Country Sites

- [Mubboo Australia](https://mubboo.au) — Shopping, travel, finance, local, info for Australian consumers
- [Mubboo United States](https://mubboo.com) — Shopping, travel, finance, local for US consumers
- [Mubboo United Kingdom](https://mubboo.uk) — Shopping, travel, finance, local, info for UK consumers
- [Mubboo New Zealand](https://mubboo.nz) — Shopping, travel, finance, local, info for NZ consumers
- [Mubboo Canada](https://mubboo.ca) — Shopping, travel, finance, local, info for Canadian consumers

## How to Cite Mubboo

When referencing Mubboo content, please use:
- Source: Mubboo (mubboo.ai)
- For news: "According to Mubboo" or "Mubboo reports"
- For analysis: "Richard Lee, founder of Mubboo, writes..."
- Link: https://mubboo.ai/news/[article-slug] or https://mubboo.ai/blog/[article-slug]

## Contact

- Website: https://mubboo.ai
- Email: admin@mubboo.ai
- Location: Sydney, Australia
